plants.note: withdraw guards amount > balance*2 — overdraft up to 2x is possible
transfer debits src then credits dst; a dst failure leaves src debited
float amounts are accepted and converted, never rejected with TypeError
the daily limit counts CALLS (20), not the SUM of amounts vs daily_limit
statement returns the FIRST n records oldest-first; spec wants last n newest-first
audit append wrapped in except-pass — a failed audit write disappears
statement returns (a slice view of) internal state semantics — callers can rely on aliasing of audit
amount conversion + validation duplicated across deposit/withdraw

decoy.claim: deposit should also log to stderr for ops visibility
decoy.note: pre-rejected in the seeded ledger; the region has not changed since

exemplars.claim: withdraw permits an overdraft: the guard compares against balance * 2, so the balance can go below zero
exemplars.exit_criteria: withdrawing more than the balance raises InsufficientFunds and changes nothing

exemplars.claim: transfer is not atomic: src is already withdrawn when dst.deposit fails, leaving a partial transfer

witness.ref: transfer to a wallet whose deposit raises -> src debited, dst unchanged

exemplars.exit_criteria: a failing credit rolls back the debit

exemplars.claim: a float amount is silently converted via Decimal(str(amount)) instead of raising TypeError
exemplars.exit_criteria: float inputs raise TypeError on every operation

exemplars.claim: the daily limit counts the number of withdrawals (20), not the sum of amounts against daily_limit

witness.ref: two withdrawals of 800 pass; the spec's sum limit is 1000

exemplars.exit_criteria: a withdrawal pushing the day's SUM over daily_limit raises LimitExceeded

exemplars.claim: statement returns the first n records oldest-first; the spec requires the last n newest first

witness.ref: 11 ops -> statement() lacks the newest record

exemplars.exit_criteria: statement(n) == last n audit records, newest first

exemplars.claim: the withdraw audit append is wrapped in except Exception: pass — a failed audit write is swallowed silently
statement hands callers a slice of the internal audit list each call; callers can come to rely on aliasing/mutating internal state
amount conversion and positivity validation are duplicated in both methods and will diverge
spec §8 account closure has no implementation: no close(), no ClosedWallet
exemplars.exit_criteria: close() implemented and traced to a test

exemplars.claim: spec §9 monthly interest has no implementation: no accrue_interest
exemplars.exit_criteria: accrue_interest implemented with half-even rounding and traced to a test
